title: grammitis clavigera
intro: Grammitis clavigera, also known as the club fern or giant shield fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Grammitis clavigera are said to include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve wound healing. Grammitis clavigera can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine, although its safety and efficacy have not been extensively scientifically proven.
